---
name: Proposal
about: Propose a change or addition to the specification.
title: "[Proposal]: "
labels: proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Provide a concise overview of your proposal.

## Motivation

Why should this proposal be considered?

## Proposed Design

Describe the proposed design in sufficient detail.

Where appropriate, include:

- object structures;
- metadata;
- examples;
- compatibility considerations.

## Backwards Compatibility

Will this proposal remain compatible with existing versions of the specification?

If not, explain why.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative approaches that were considered.

## Additional Context

Include any supporting information, diagrams, or references.
